We’re also seeing particularly good deals on Microsoft’s Snapdragon X Elite-powered Surface 2-in-1 and notebooks, which are now down to some of their lowest prices at up to $1,350 off. While these models may not be part of the very latest wave of Copilot+ PCs, they still stand as the most powerful ARM-based Surface Laptops currently available, especially considering the newer 2025 refresh shipped with octa-core Snapdragon X Plus chips. It’s likely that next-generation Surface notebooks will arrive later this year, featuring the latest Snapdragon X2 series processors, but the clearance pricing on these existing models makes them hard to ignore, with deals now starting at $1,049.99 shipped. Head below for more details.
